title: Support checking access qualifier for `typedef` inside class

features.name: local typedef inside class accessed externally
features.description: Code should include a class with a local typedef and an attempt to access that typedef from outside the class using :: scope resolution

features.name: protected typedef inside class accessed externally
features.description: Code should include a class with a protected typedef and an attempt to access that typedef from outside the class using :: scope resolution

features.name: typedef access via scope resolution operator
features.description: Code should include a class member typedef accessed through :: scope resolution operator from outside the class
